title: VEYLIN 8-Pack Large Pop Tubes Sensory Fidget Toys For Children or Adults, Autism and Special Needs, Reduce Anxiety and Stress, Bendable Tubes for DIY and Anxiety, Suitable for Kids & Adults with ADHD
features: PACKAGE: Get 8 durable sensory fidget tubes in 8 vibrant colors for kids to choose from. These tubes can be stretched and twisted into any shape while making popping sounds.
STRESS RELIEF: Squeeze, stretch, pull, and press these fun pop tubes to help relieve stress and reduce anxiety. Perfect for individuals with autism, ADHD, ADD, or special needs.
PREMIUM MATERIALS: Made from food-grade plastic, these sensory stretch tubes are durable, non-toxic, and lightweight, making them ideal for kids aged 3 and up.

BRIGHT COLORS & FUN SOUNDS: The vibrant colors attract kids' attention, while the cool sounds and pops during stretching or shrinking keep them engaged and entertained. A creative puzzle toy for kids to enjoy even indoors.
PERFECT GIFT: Ideal as birthday gifts, Valentine’s Day party favors, classroom rewards, school exchange presents, and perfect for children with developmental delays or special needs.

FUN & EDUCATIONAL: Kids can stretch, bend, or twist the tubes, strengthening hand and arm muscles while improving hand tremors. Parents and children can explore various poses and invent new games to spark creativity and imaginative thinking.
description: Product Description Toddler Sensory Toys These engaging sensory toys help children recognize colors while sparking creativity and encouraging imaginative play. As a sound-transmitting toy Perfect for group play—kids can share the fun and use the tubes as sound channels to send messages and spark interaction. Superior & High Quality Made from premium BPA- and lead-free plastic, these colorful Montessori pipes are built to endure endless fidgeting, popping, stretching, and bending—safe and ultra-durable.
